# Add AI workflow fixtures, tests, and docs

## Goal

Make AI Workflow Intelligence testable, demoable, and understandable.

## Scope

- Synthetic AI-assisted PRs
- Synthetic agent-created PRs
- Synthetic review amplification cases
- Synthetic rework, revert, incident, and test-gap cases
- Demo data for AI Impact, Review Load, Risk, Opportunity, and Governance views
- User-facing documentation
- Developer documentation

## Acceptance criteria

- Fixtures cover attribution, metrics, API, and UX scenarios
- Unit tests cover attribution and metric computation
- Integration tests cover storage and API contracts
- E2E tests cover core AI dashboard navigation
- Docs explain metric definitions and misuse guardrails
- Demo mode can show AI workflow views without a live backend
